message:
Update Twitter followers to 29K+ and add stats refresh script

- Update Twitter/X audience count from 20K+ to 29K+
- Add scripts/update-stats.ts for build-time stats refresh
- Script fetches GitHub stars from API (free) and supports
  TWITTER_FOLLOWERS env var for Twitter count updates
- Add "update-stats" and "build:with-stats" npm scripts
- To update stats at build time: bun run build:with-stats
- Or set TWITTER_FOLLOWERS env var in Vercel for automatic updates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,8 @@
     "preinstall": "node -e \"if (process.env.npm_execpath.indexOf('npm') !== -1) { console.error('\\n\\n❌ ERROR: This project uses BUN, not npm!\\n\\nPlease use: bun install\\n\\n'); process.exit(1); }\"",
     "dev": "next dev",
     "build": "rm -rf .next && next build",
+    "build:with-stats": "bun run update-stats && rm -rf .next && next build",
+    "update-stats": "bun run scripts/update-stats.ts",
     "start": "next start",
     "lint": "eslint",
     "test": "vitest",
